markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content performance, new agency collaboration, and website strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Agency Collaboration:** A new demand gen agency requires Imubit's content keywords to launch paid ads. GrowthX will provide an export today and schedule a deeper alignment session.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Shift:** The focus is shifting from traffic (a vanity metric) to measurable conversions. GrowthX will design new CTAs (sticky banners, gated assets) for the upcoming Webflow site to drive revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [**Backlink Quality:** Imubit flagged backlink quality as poor. GrowthX is investigating a solution and will add backlinks to new monthly performance recaps to ensure transparency.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [**Content Refresh Success:** Refreshing top-performing articles is successfully reviving traffic. The "Advanced Process Control" piece, refreshed in January, saw impressions rebound after a period of decline.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy: From Traffic to Revenue

  - [**Problem:** Current blog articles are "islands" with no clear next steps, making traffic a vanity metric.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [**Goal:** Drive measurable conversions (demos, gated assets) to prove revenue impact.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [**Proposed Solutions (for new Webflow site):**](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
      - [**Sticky CTA:** A persistent banner that scrolls with the page.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
      - [**Gated Assets:** Repurpose blog content into guides (e.g., "refining" guide) to capture leads.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
      - [**Testimonial Callouts:** Insert relevant customer quotes with links to case studies or demos.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
  - [**Tracking:** GA4 setup must be updated to track individual CTA clicks for accurate performance measurement.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)

### New Demand Gen Agency Collaboration

  - [**Need:** A direct workflow between GrowthX and the new agency, avoiding Tara as a bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [**Critical Dependency:** The agency requires Imubit's content keywords to launch paid ad campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will provide a keyword export today and schedule a joint alignment session once the agency is fully onboarded.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)

### Content Performance & Backlinks

  - [**Content Refresh Success:** Refreshing top-performing articles is successfully reviving traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
      - [**Example:** The "Advanced Process Control" article, refreshed in January, saw impressions rebound after a period of decline.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX uses SEMrush to identify articles for refresh, either by updating for LLM visibility or rewriting to target keywords they already rank for.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [**Backlink Quality:** Imubit flagged current backlinks as poor quality.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX's GTM team is investigating a solution.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
      - [**Reporting:** Backlinks will be included in new monthly performance recaps to ensure transparency.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)

### CMS Migration & Publishing

  - [**Status:** The Webflow migration is delayed as Imubit is refreshing homepage and product page content.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [**Automation:** GrowthX requires a Webflow API key to enable auto-publishing from its Atlas content engine, which will save significant manual effort.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [**Article Dates:** Imubit plans to remove dates from articles to avoid signaling batch-produced AI content. GrowthX will present a counter-argument for their value.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)

### Executive Reporting

  - [**Need:** Executive reports must include hard numbers on growth, reach, and traffic, not just qualitative wins (e.g., LLM visibility).](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will update the executive snapshot to include these metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
      - [Resend Check That invite; flag access bug to the team.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
      - [Provide keyword export to Imubit today.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
      - [Investigate backlink quality solution.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
      - [Design new CTAs for the Webflow blog template.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
      - [Update executive snapshot with performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)
  - [**Imubit:**](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
      - [Provide Webflow API key upon migration.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
      - [Share public customer testimonials for potential CTA use.](https://fathom.video/share/4FT1GQV8mDfYGf7SyDz3svD8KihHyxf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
